description: You are a facade consultant at a curtain wall fabricator. The structural engineer's frame model for the 'Greenfield Innovation Hub' is complete; you must now provide the envelope model with correct IFC types. Create an IFC project in Bonsai (BlenderBIM) with 'Greenfield' in the project name. The model must include a glazed curtain wall facade consisting of at least one IfcCurtainWall entity, three IfcMember entities (mullions/transoms), and two IfcPlate entities (glazing panels). Assign a material containing 'Glass' or 'Glazing' in its name to at least one element. Save the project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/facade_curtainwall.ifc.
